<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-32|*TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')*>
Events: 1 · New · Severity: Trivial
Add a null coalesce (`?? []`) to the `questions` prop in `FaqBlock` or at the call-site in `guides/[slug]/page.tsx` to guard against `null` from MDX frontmatter.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-940/fix-faqblock-crash-when-questions-prop-is-undefined-at-runtime|DEV-940> — Fix FaqBlock crash when questions prop is undefined at runtime · Priority: Normal · Labels: Bug, S
